title: Nanbin Create Mod
description: We add more object so that you can create everything you want to create！
body:
# **Nanbin Creative Mod Description**
Nanbin Create is a Minecraft modification (mod) developed by LIEH_SAD, built on the foundation of the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod and designed to expand creative building and transit infrastructure capabilities. It enriches the game with specialized blocks and functional elements tailored for constructing realistic, immersive railway and transit systems, as well as custom player creations.
## Core Features & Added Blocks

### Platform Blocks
Dedicated blocks for building passenger platforms, available in various textures and sizes to match different station styles (e.g., concrete, tile, metal). They support seamless integration with MTR tracks and create authentic platform surfaces for waiting areas.
### Station Building Blocks
A curated set of structural blocks for constructing full-scale station buildings, including walls, roofs, pillars, and decorative facades. These blocks enable players to design modern, industrial, or classic transit hubs with cohesive aesthetics.
Platform Screen Doors (PSDs)
Functional platform end/edge doors that mimic real-world transit safety barriers. They automatically align with train carriages, enhance realism, and add a polished, professional look to station platforms.
### Player Creative Blocks
Customizable, flexible blocks for free-form building and unique design projects. These blocks offer diverse shapes, colors, and interactive properties, empowering players to craft original structures, art installations, or transit-related custom features beyond standard templates.
### Sound Barrier Nets
Decorative and functional noise-reduction blocks/netting for railway lines and stations. They reduce in-game ambient noise from trains, add visual detail to trackside areas, and complete the immersive transit environment.
## Compatibility & Use Case
- Base Dependency: Requires the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod to function fully, as it extends MTR’s transit mechanics.
- Gameplay Focus: Ideal for players building detailed railway networks, urban transit systems, or creative infrastructure projects. It bridges technical transit functionality with artistic building freedom, making it perfect for both functional transit builds and aesthetic creative mode projects.
